title: Pisto
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Pistos''' were [[Insect/Legends|insects]] that lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Colla IV/Legends|Colla IV]]. They were eaten by the native [[Colicoid/Legends|Colicoids]] in the tropical regions of the planet.

The [[Pistoeka sabotage droid/Legends|Pistoeka sabotage droid's]] design was based on their likeness.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2006-06-27 -->''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''
